name: Sugar Doodles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine cookie mix, eggs, oil, and water. Mix well.
2. Stir in all the chips. Cover and refrigerate dough for 1 hour or until easy to handle.
3. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
4. Shape dough into 1 1/2-inch balls.
5. Place colored sugar and granulated sugar in a large resealable bag; shake well to blend.
6. Place two balls into the bag, seal, and shake well.
7. Place sugared balls two inches apart onto prepared baking sheet.
8. Repeat until all balls are coated with sugar mixture.
9. Bake for 10 minutes or until set. Cool completely.
